response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and a track record of building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or cross-team leadership in measurement frameworks — key requirements for a Principal IC6 role.
strengths: Proven ability to build scalable, distributed systems across multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, C++)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling innovation (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Demonstrated cross-functional ownership and mentorship via workshops and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation/feature-flagging platforms at scale
Limited visibility into metrics, telemetry, or statistical analysis experience for growth systems
Role history shows individual contributor depth but minimal indication of cross-team influence or strategic ownership
